# synthesized: claude-anyteam Python installer prereq failure when tmux/psmux is missing.
claude-anyteam needs a terminal multiplexer before it can install teammate mode.

No supported multiplexer was found on PATH for linux.
Install tmux, then rerun `claude-anyteam install --assume-yes`.

Suggested commands:
  Debian/Ubuntu: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y tmux
  macOS/Homebrew: brew install tmux
